emails.subject: Congrats
emails.body: Congrats Dale, Congratulations. Well deserved. I am very happy your tremendous contribution to the company has been recognized. Vince

emails.subject: Re: Congrats
emails.body: Re: Congrats Vince, Thanks for the note and congratulations on yours as well. I haven't had too much to do yet with the research guys here as they're pretty much self directed. Once a week (Thursday AM) I've started a joint project update meeting with Structuring and Research. I hope this way the Structuring team can bounce quantitative issues off Research and the Research guys can stay closer to the commercial deals. Dale Vince J Kaminski 11/01/2000 16:08

emails.subject: Re: Congrats
